programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Color Me Lonely
programme.desc: Kris goes overboard trying to make sure Bruce isn’t getting lonely now that they are separated. Meanwhile, Scott and Kourtney inherit a painting that might be worth millions.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Doggy Blu's
programme.desc: Khloé wonders if she's being too hard on Kris. Meanwhile, Kendall and Kris battle over Kendall's dog, and Scott surprises Kourtney with his new mobile office.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Vienna Incidents
programme.desc: A trip to Vienna proves to be an eye opening experience for Kim and Kris as they encounter some shocking racist remarks. Meanwhile, Kourtney finds excuses to stall moving into her new home.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Playing Dirty
programme.desc: Kris encourages Kourtney to shut down Scott's lavish plans for their new backyard. Things get down and dirty for Kim & Khloé when they find themselves in a mud wrestling match.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: Khloé struggles with moving out of her house and things get complicated when some of Lamar's jewelry is stolen. Bruce attempts to bond with Brody, but learns that his approach still needs some practice.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Thailand Vacation Part One
programme.desc: The family vacation to Thailand gets off to a bumpy start when Kourtney, Scott, and Rob decide not to come, and Kris and Bruce are fighting even before the family takes off.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Thailand Vacation Part Two
programme.desc: The family vacation continues to go south when the family discovers that Kendall and Kylie have run off and disappeared in Thailand. Meanwhile, Khloé begins to crumble under the pressure of feeling that everyone expects her to be Rob's keeper.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Thailand Vacation Part Three
programme.desc: When the family visits an orphanage in Thailand, Kim builds a connection with a young girl and struggles to find ways to enrich and better her life. Meanwhile, Brody and Brandon try to cheer up Khloé and find her a vacation fling.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Design for Disaster
programme.desc: When Khloé feels overwhelmed about decorating her house, Kourtney offers her services but fails to inform her sister that she comes at a high price. Plus, Kris helps her mom alleviate her fear of medical marijuana, but Bruce grows livid when he finds out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Secrets of a Double Life
programme.desc: When Khloé starts living a secret life with a new group of friends and a new guy, Kim and Kourtney make it their mission to find out what's really going on with their sister. Also, Kris can't accept that Kim wants to plan her wedding without her help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rocking the Cradle
programme.desc: When Kourtney surprises Scott with unexpected news of a third child on the way, Scott shuts down and tries to run away. Meanwhile, as Kim races to get the final details of her wedding in check, she runs into major drama with Brody.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Journey to the Altar
programme.desc: Kim and Kanye take their closest friends and family on an intimate, behind the scenes adventure from Paris to Italy, and through the whirlwind of days and events leading up to their exquisite wedding.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: When Kourtney, Khloé, and Scott arrive in the Hamptons to start their picture-perfect summer, Scott is overwhelmed by the anxiety of being in his late parents' hometown and runs back to his old habits.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: What's That Racquet?
programme.desc: After Kourtney admonishes Scott for breaking the boundaries they've set for their relationship, he makes attempts to clean up his act and get back in her good graces. Meanwhile, Khloé tries to get Scott on a healthy track with tennis.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Party Crashing
programme.desc: When Kourtney learns that Kim is using her home for North's birthday party without her permission, she flies to LA to confront her. Back in the Hamptons, Scott finds himself in the hospital after partying too much and realizes he must make a change.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: 12 Steps and 30 Candles
programme.desc: Scott finally decides to make a change in his life and checks into rehab, but his commitment to stay wavers with each day. As her 30th birthday quickly approaches, Khloé struggles with the realization that her life isn't where she thought it would be.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Aftershocks
programme.desc: After Scott unexpectedly leaves rehab early, Kourtney and Scott try to avoid repeating their past mistakes. Meanwhile, Kim begins doubting her best friend Jonathan's loyalty when family secrets are leaked to the media.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You've Got to be Kidding Me!
programme.desc: Military veteran and grandma Line Pelletier and Brooklyn soul food chef Chris Scott try to school each other for a chance to get Bobby Flay beat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sour With The Sweet
programme.desc: Barbecue fusion master Robert Cho and over-the-top Brian Malarkey are hungry for a win. Food Network's Sunny Anderson and chef Josh Capon will be serving one of them up to Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Deja Flay
programme.desc: Beat Bobby Flay winner Anne Burrell is ready to battle once again, but this time she'll have to cook against hotshot chef Marcus Samuelsson. Food Network's Scott Conant sits back and relaxes as his dream team takes center stage.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Challah At Your Boy!
programme.desc: Anne Burrell and Jay Pharoah plot and strategize on how to get Bobby Flay beat. Canadian chef Rene Rodriguez brings his south of the border flavors against the Italian fare of chef Michael Kramer.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Any Given Sunday
programme.desc: Chefs Geoffrey Zakarian and Chris Santos have brought their expert taste buds to the arena with a single objective: make Mom proud! Seasoned vet Kathy Cary squares off with acclaimed chef Shanna O'Hea.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clash of the Culinary Titans
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson and Chopped's Ted Allen have Bobby Flay in their sights and are calling in two contenders to finish the job.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Windy City Wants More
programme.desc: Toronto's David Adjey and Chicago's Cory Morris determine whether Chopped judge Scott Conant or Internet star Hannah Hart will go up against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Belly Up!
programme.desc: Chefs Claire Robinson and Scott Conant bring in meat masters Max Hosey and Ash Fulk to take down Bobby Flay. The competition heats up when Scott reveals his obsession with the winning contender's signature dish.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Somewhere Over the Rainbow
programme.desc: Food Network's Alex Guarnaschelli and Chef Michael Voltaggio love nothing more than getting Bobby Flay beat. They're cheering on fine dining expert Jennifer Dewasha and seafood aficionado Devin Bozkaya, who are ready to battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The View from the Top
programme.desc: Food Network's Michael Symon gets help from "The View's" Sunny Hostin as they try to cut Bobby Flay down to size. New York chef Pom Amaritnant duels with chef Troy Gagliardo from North Carolina for a chance to dethrone the king.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Spring Bunnies and Chickens, Oh My!
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to create beautiful edible eggs with a surprise flavor and decorative spring chick. Then the bakers try to impress judges Kardea Brown, Nancy Fuller and Duff Goldman with their spectacular hot cross bunnies.

programme.title: Easter Basket Challenge: Which Bunny Wore It Best?
programme.desc: Host Sunny Anderson challenges the six remaining bakers to rock the runway with their Easter candy-inspired takes on fashion trends. The competitors strut down a craveworthy catwalk in the best-looking and even better-tasting Easter bonnets.

programme.title: The Big Bake: Spring: Some Bunny Wants Cake
programme.desc: Cotton tails, floppy ears and whiskered noses inspire the bakers to pay homage to the bunny rabbit with their cake designs.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Carolina Comfort

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: There's Nothing Like Home Cooking

programme.desc: Atz Lee unites the brood of Kilcher siblings as he nears the completion of Fox Cabin. Then, Eivin suffers a devastating loss, while Jane, August and Eitienne head out for the final fishing trip of the year.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Last Straw

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Soul Survivor

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Good Husband
programme.desc: A forty-year-old man was found dead in his car. Initially, there was no obvious medical explanation for Tom's death but when police uncovered a love triangle, this tragedy quickly turned into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Collision
programme.desc: A wife and a mistress vying for the same man, end up in a high-speed showdown on a highway. The man of their dreams, on his motorcycle nearby, was struck and killed. His wife arrested for his murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Silhouette
programme.desc: Real-life mysteries. Investigative reporting. Justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Secret Lives
programme.desc: This story was one of Andrea Canning's first assignments for 'Dateline,' and one she still can’t forget. When Jen Ramsaran disappeared, police searched online for clues and wondered if she escaped the real world for a fantasy world.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: He was a firefighter used to rescuing others. Now he was the one in desperate need of help. He found his wife bloodied and motionless on the bedroom floor. Could he save her in time? It was a chilling crime with no shortage of potential suspects.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: Melvin Roberts was larger than life. Former mayor. Prominent attorney. He even had a street named after him. When cops found him dead in his driveway, it marked the start of a tough case. In addition to friends, Melvin Roberts had plenty of enemies.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Secret Lives
programme.desc: This story was one of Andrea Canning's first assignments for 'Dateline,' and one she still can’t forget. When Jen Ramsaran disappeared, police searched online for clues and wondered if she escaped the real world for a fantasy world.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas
programme.desc: Meghan Verikas had been attracted to Leon Jacob, in part, because as a doctor he saved lives. Now police officers were telling her he was trying to hire a hitman, potentially to take hers. But authorities had a plan of their own.

programme.title: Snapped: Vegas Bray
programme.desc: An attractive woman witnesses her ex-boyfriend’s shooting, but can’t remember what happened, raising questions about suicide, stalking and split personalities.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Unrequited
programme.desc: An anonymous letter leads to the exhumation of an elderly man whom, it is discovered, has been poisoned.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Pas De Deux
programme.desc: The detectives are suspicious when a neck bomb kills an unlikely bank robber.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Mis-Labeled
programme.desc: When a pharmaceutical executive is found cut in half in midtown Manhattan, detectives discover another crime.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: Connie and Larry Hoagland built a life centered on faith and family. Then, a vicious attack threatened it all. Someone wanted Connie dead. But who? After a bomb exploded underneath her car, secrets started to emerge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unraveled
programme.desc: For an agonizing four days, the fear was paralyzing. A city was under siege. Six people had been gunned down, but how were the killings linked? A retired detective connected the dots, initiating the manhunt for a man with a gun and a grudge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Texas Twist
programme.desc: Named for the body of Christ, Corpus Christi sits on the Texas gulf coast. This part of the Lone Star State is largely sheltered from hurricanes. But as it turned out, not from one unnatural disaster.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Gathering Storm
programme.desc: Russel Douglas was a troubled father hoping for a fresh start when he was found shot dead in his car. The investigation would turn up few clues until an anonymous tipster sent detectives on an international manhunt to unravel a mystery.

programme.title: Movie: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family of four living in an isolated farmhouse must remain absolutely silent because of the deadly monsters that hunt using sound that live all around them, but with a new baby on the way that perpetual and safe silence may soon be shattered.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mr. Lisa's Opus

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Boy

programme.title: The Simpsons: Haw-Haw Land

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Is Where the Art Isn't

programme.title: The Simpsons: 3 Scenes Plus a Tag From a Marriage

programme.title: The Simpsons: No Good Read Goes Unpunished

programme.title: The Simpsons: King Leer
programme.desc: Homer and Marge follow Moe after the bar closes early and discover him and his father fighting. The Simpsons, after finding out that Moe has been excommunicated from his family for years, attempt to bring them back together.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Forgive and Regret

programme.desc: After receiving an insurance payout, the Simpsons go to Denmark, so Grampa can benefit from the country's free healthcare.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Flanders' Ladder

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories: The Hunt

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories: Too Close for Comfort

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories: Down to the Wire

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Becky braves sub-zero temperatures to fish a remote, frozen lake. Kim and Pierre break camp and begin their winter trapping season. Bentley heads cross-county with a fishing boat in tow.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories: Out in The Cold
programme.desc: Kim and Pierre's trapping season is complicated by a troublesome local resident; Becky enlists her dog team to help secure a supply of firewood. 'Pike' Mike hunts for small game; Bentley teaches his young nephew the tricks of the trapping trade.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories: Feast or Famine

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's All Dutch to Me

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol Side of the Moon
programme.desc: During the heart of the fall, a freak snow storm blows through. This happens on an already odd week, with a full moon and Halloween which is keeping Dr. Pol and the vets very busy!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Barking Bad
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, Charles and Dr. Brenda tackle the problems of a feisty alpaca, a troubled twosome of dairy cows and a miniature donkey with a fungus problem on its feet.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Lost Islands of Desolation
programme.desc: The ruins of a mysterious hideout in Croatia and the decaying remains of Ireland's Alcatraz contain a haunting past; experts investigate the secrets behind these deserted island structures to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base
programme.desc: Abandoned hangers and bunkers populate a bizarre facility in the middle of nowhere, but among them are other structures whose purpose are oddly obscured; experts investigate a highly-classified military cover-up with extraterrestrial objectives.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Swastika Conspiracy
programme.desc: A sinister giant swastika appears in a forest in Germany. A strange pattern is etched into the desert near the famous Nazca lines, but archaeologists don't know who put it there. Mysterious markings are spotted in an isolated corner of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hitler's Lost Gold
programme.desc: New evidence might finally identify the hiding place of Hitler's billion-dollar gold train. A discovery of a long-lost settlement rewrites the history of the Vikings in North America. A blood-red river in Siberia points to catastrophic pollution.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters
programme.desc: Strange circles of reindeer appear in the remote tundra of Sweden, experts investigate if this mysterious event could be evidence of fatal aftershocks from the Chernobyl nuclear disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: In Kerrville, Texas, a long-simmering family feud takes a deadly turn when suspicions and tempers take over. It's a decades-long drama with a shocking ending that nobody sees coming.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Following her divorce, Cristi buys a new home that needs work. Hoping handyman Curtis can fix it up, she ends up getting more than she bargained for. Curtis becomes fixated with Cristi and will stop at nothing until she becomes his.

programme.title: Betrayed: Life and Limb
programme.desc: Jay Orbin is living the American Dream; he's a self-made millionaire with a loving family and beautiful wife. But when his headless torso is found in the desert, his cut-throat business and seemingly perfect life reveal some very dark secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone in 90 Seconds
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old Arizona girl vanishes while waiting for an ice cream truck, it's clear she's been abducted. The search for her leads to a trail of suspects, making it the largest missing child investigation in Arizona history.

programme.title: In Pursuit: The Missing
programme.desc: In the picturesque town of Cape Coral, Florida, Cal investigates the disappearance of 29-year-old single mother Lauren Dumolo before heading to Ft. Lauderdale to uncover the truth behind a mysterious case involving a missing teen named Sophie Reeder.

programme.title: A Shot in the Night
programme.desc: In the Lindsey Wilkins case, what at first appears to be a suicide is quickly determined to be murder. Investigators face the toughest job of their careers to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Jewel Stolen
programme.desc: When a young mother is found murdered in her own home, investigators must untangle a web of lies using wiretaps and secret recordings to ultimately pick up the trail of her cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: In Pursuit: The Missing
programme.desc: In the picturesque town of Cape Coral, Florida, Cal investigates the disappearance of 29-year-old single mother Lauren Dumolo before heading to Ft. Lauderdale to uncover the truth behind a mysterious case involving a missing teen named Sophie Reeder.

programme.title: A Shot in the Night
programme.desc: In the Lindsey Wilkins case, what at first appears to be a suicide is quickly determined to be murder. Investigators face the toughest job of their careers to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: As investigators study the chilling crime scene inside Wendi Brant's horse ranch, one thing seems clear, the 45-year-old had been brutally killed by someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Don't You Be My Neighbor
programme.desc: The suspect pool grows when one woman steps in to help the investigation into the murder of her younger sister. A break in the case comes when she and her family pressure the state to follow important evidence.

programme.title: Extreme Measures: Keep Your Enemies Close
programme.desc: A killer lurks nearby as a Texas woman and her two grown daughters try desperately to piece together what happened when her eldest daughter is found murdered.

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye: Overkill
programme.desc: A husband returns home to find his wife viciously murdered just steps away from their infant daughter. The clues point to someone she knows, so everyone is a suspect. Then, investigators uncover a dark secret and reveal a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Krishna Killers
programme.desc: Hare Krishnas follow a religion based on divine love. But the mysterious disappearance of a charismatic devotee exposes a disturbing dark side. When another member is shot dead, police uncover a twisted web of murder and betrayal.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: Lost Boys
programme.desc: A protective grandfather is found beaten to death on the side of the road. The crime scene offers few clues, but news of a recent incident involving a beloved birthday gift leads Detective Demery to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: The Affairs of Soldiers
programme.desc: A soldier comes home with his five year old son and finds his wife, an Army Officer stationed at Fort Bliss in El Paso, Texas, brutally stabbed to death.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Body in the Glades
programme.desc: 42-year-old Miami mother Raquel Calderin vanishes without a trace on her way home from work in 2012. The investigation will lead detectives deep into a disturbing family picture, and the truth will haunt them for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare: Apartment 23
programme.desc: With graduation nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apartment. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right in front of them.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own
programme.desc: Native Swede, Marioara Shand, is setting out on her own in Taos, New Mexico, after a recent breakup. One day in July of 2002, police discover her body in a brutal, bloody scene inside her new home.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: When an eight-year old girl is found strangled to death, a local woman is instrumental in helping detectives bring the girl's brutal killer to justice.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Hidden Truths
programme.desc: Indle King hasn't seen his wife Anastasia since she abandoned him at the Moscow airport. After returning to Seattle alone, Indle meets with the detectives tasked with unraveling the series of events that led to his bride's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ballard
programme.desc: An early 1900s cabin that's intimately tied to Maine's history and legacy puts Chase and the team to the test as they try to re-create its original look and feel.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fry Hard III: Fry, Tempura, Fry!
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes on the most mythic, magical, but often times monstrous form of frying known to modern man.

programme.title: Good Eats: Oat Cuisine II
programme.desc: Alton Brown helps you get more oats in your diet with some very surprising culinary ideas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Squash Court II
programme.desc: Alton Brown cooks with summer squash.

programme.title: Good Eats: Egg Files VII: Meringue
programme.desc: Alton prepares three meringue-based desserts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Milwaukee
programme.desc: Milwaukee may be known for its beer, but it's also home to mouth-watering classic American foods. From cheese curds and bratwurst to frozen custard and butter burgers, Andrew shows us why this Midwestern city is a great food town.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Miami
programme.desc: Miami's beaches and glitzy nightlife make it an international hot spot, but it's the food that really gives this city flavour. From Cuban sandwiches to fresh stone crabs and key lime pie, Andrew reveals Miami's iconic foods.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Orlando
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Orlando, Florida, to discover the incredible rich food scene that's often left in the shadow of Disney World.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Detroit
programme.desc: Andrew heads to the Motor City to grab a slice of Detroit-style pizza, line up for a Coney Island dog and chili fries, fill up on timeless Middle Eastern classics and dine at a Detroit institution in the making.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco: Second Bite
programme.desc: San Francisco's food scene is so impressive, it deserves a second trip. From Japanese hot pots and hand-crafted lasagna to ice cream made from locally sourced ingredients, Andrew explores the city's culinary history and diversity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: El Paso
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, where Texas meets Mexico on the border as well as in the kitchen. The city is filled to the brim of its 10-gallon hat with Tex-Mex cuisine as well as Mexican classics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears./Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it – no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Write Stuff/ Racing Hearts
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-books way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over. When Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods, they discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Birthday/ Haircut
programme.desc: When Annie and Pony try to give Gerry the best birthday ever, their enthusiasm threatens to make it the worst. When Annie needs a haircut, Pony proves that even a simple task can become a wild adventure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfish Hunter/ The Fry Cook Games
programme.desc: Customers love SpongeBob's jellyfish Krabby Patty. The fast food Olympics take place.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: As Seen on TV/ Can You Spare a Dime
programme.desc: Krabs makes a low-budget commercial; accused of stealing, Squidward quits his job.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's House Party
programme.desc: While grocery shopping, SpongeBob discovers a 'How to Throw a Party' kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Home Improvement/ Undivided Attention
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: No Egrets/ Meal Ticket
programme.desc: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he’s their mama. Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck… at the Yoon Kwan concert.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Talkin' Trash/ Timmy TV
programme.desc: Cosmo's magic trash bags invite disaster; Fairy World is watching Timmy TV.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dimmsdale Tales
programme.desc: Dad takes the Squirrely Scouts on a camping trip and forgets all the supplies. Timmy tries to make the most of their trip by telling a collection of scary stories around a campfire.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Masked Magician/ The Big Bash
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Magician powers to perform at the fair; Cupid has a party at his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Meet the Odd Parents
programme.desc: Mom and Dad figure out that Timmy has fairy godparents.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Vicky Loses Her Icky/ Pixies Inc.
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Vicky to be nice; the anti-fun Pixies take over Fairyworld.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Birthday Bashed/ Momnipresent
programme.desc: Timmy refuses to celebrate his birthday; it's SepTIMberfest, a big Hollywood event.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Turner and Pooch/ Dumbbell Curve
programme.desc: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy's house. Realizing it's Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. Crocker grades on a bell curve so Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say 'Ahhh!'/ Oddpirates
programme.desc: Timmy has to have his tonsils removed! And his nurse is Vicky, who's determined to make his stay as painful as possible. The Pirates opening game is today, and everyone except Timmy is going, instead he is on a real Pirate ship.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof
programme.desc: For every fairy, there's an anti-fairy - thus anti-Poof is born -FOOP!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Super Charge: World Famous! (In New Zealand)
programme.desc: When one of Sledge's transport pods is spotted in New Zealand, the Rangers head to Auckland and are shocked to discover the existence of a new Ranger.

programme.title: The Loud House: Crimes of Fashion/ Scales of Justice
programme.desc: When Leni gets fired from her job due to missing scarves, Lincoln and Clyde take on the case.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous!
programme.desc: Darkwing gains an unlikely sidekick as he uncovers a dark conspiracy tied to the Missing Mysteries and one of Scrooge's employees.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Life and Crimes of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Scrooge’s enemies reveal a secret history to prove that Scrooge is responsible for turning them evil, forcing Louie to defend his uncle against their prosecutor: Doofus Drake.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Dewey must embrace his inner heel to beat the beloved Viking wrestling champ Jormungandr in a battle royale for the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: With F.O.W.L. at their heels, Scrooge tests out the Money Bin’s deadly new security system on Louie and Della, while Beakley and Webby train the others for an enemy attack.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Goldie O'Gilt are turned into teenagers as they race Rockerduck to the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beaks in the Shell!
programme.desc: Huey struggles to keep Fenton and Gandra’s top secret experiment (and their relationship) hidden from the world. Mark Beaks is desperate for one last gizmo to steal.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: Daytrip of Doom!
programme.desc: The nephews take Webby to Funso's Fun Zone and have a dangerous run-in with the Beagle Boys. Donald rebels against Mrs. Beakley's strict "house rules."

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Lagoon of White Agony Plains!
programme.desc: Scrooge reteams with his conniving ex-partner and old flame, Goldie O' Gilt, to find a long-lost golden lagoon, but Glomgold has other plans.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Temptation Island: Blake the Fake
programme.desc: Things are heating up in the guys' villa, while their girlfriends question the singles' intentions.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Have Yourself a Very Little Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is driving everyone a little crazy as they all search for the perfect gifts.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Hearts
programme.desc: A Montana rancher learns he is the heir of a late King and has inherited the throne.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love

programme.title: Movie: Perfect Match
programme.desc: When an engaged couple can't agree on anything, the mother of the groom hires a wedding planner and an event planner to help. The two planners are as different as night and day, but they soon learn opposites do indeed attract.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig

programme.title: South Park: A Song of Ass and Fire

programme.title: South Park: Titties and Dragons

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers

programme.title: South Park: The Hobbit

programme.title: South Park: Fishsticks

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet

programme.title: South Park: Dances With Smurfs
programme.desc: Cartman is chosen to do the morning announcements at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: South Park: More Crap

programme.title: South Park: Pee

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Beat Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Derek has the engagement ring and searches for the perfect way to propose to Meredith. Lexie demands that Mark go public with their relationship. Bailey considers a new direction for her medical career.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Before and After
programme.desc: Addison, Naomi and Sam rush the ailing Archer to Seattle Grace and reunite with their old friends Derek and Mark. Izzie employs her fellow doctors in a medical game designed to teach the interns, and Owen runs into a significant someone from his past.

programme.title: The Closer: Family Affair
programme.desc: The squad helps out a fellow law enforcement officer by investigating the mysterious death of her daughter. Captain Raydor continues her audit of Brenda and Major Crimes, focusing his efforts on Detective Sanchez.

programme.title: The Closer: Death Warrant
programme.desc: Brenda receives a tip about a murder-for-hire involving a major drug cartel and solicits Captain Raydor's help. Meanwhile, Brenda's attorney starts deposing the squad about the case at the centre of the civil lawsuit.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Acting Out
programme.desc: A Hollywood comeback is interrupted when a former child star is found dead on skid row, leaving the director of the actor's current movie and his manager as prime suspects. Flynn's daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: There is a miscarriage of justice when a gang banger is acquitted of murder and released from custody. Sharon's ex-husband, Jack Raydor represents the suspect in a subsequent murder. Rusty takes a chance when the guy he has a crush on visits.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Santa finds himself on the naughty list after robbing a bank, but a Santa flash mob complicates his apprehension and the Major Crimes unit scrambles to figure out how things went so wrong. Sharon's kids come to town for the holidays.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Don't Hate the Player

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Gianni Versace Murder
programme.desc: Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was fatally shot on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion in broad daylight. The mystery of his death is unraveled by those closest to him and his killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Casey Anthony Story
programme.desc: Two year-old Florida toddler Caylee Anthony vanished in 2008. Her mother Casey Anthony tells investigators that Caylee has been kidnapped by a nanny that no one in the family has seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.desc: We analyze the reasons for the raid of a bizarre religious compound in Waco, Texas in 1993, and look at what was happening inside the Branch Davidian compound.

programme.desc: Josh joins Tickle and the Laws to build a winter-proof still site. Mountain man Mark converts a free load of sugar beets into high-proof moonshine. Mike and Jerry crack a few nuts to turn their column-distilled liquor into southern pecan liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke and Shine: Re-Enactment
programme.desc: Mark and Digger come up with a solution to the jar shortage, but it may not be worth all the trouble. Tim enlists Tickle's friend Howard to help recreate the first whiskey made in America. Mike and Jerry make use of surplus restaurant supplies.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke and Shine: New Brew
programme.desc: Mark and Digger transform hundreds of jars of expired mandarin oranges into marketable liquor using a new recipe they created. Tickle and the Laws struggle to create freeze-distilled apple liquor. Mike and Jerry make birch bark moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smoke and Shine: New and Old
programme.desc: Master distiller Richard Landry helps Tickle and the Laws invent a new recipe. Digger and Mark crack their thousand jar problem while mashing in their most profitable run in years. Tim and Howard make a ceramic still to rediscover a colonial whiskey.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Basement Bust
programme.desc: Josh gains access to a cellar still site, but even help from the Laws can't keep trouble from surfacing. Mark and Digger innovate a way to cut the cost of water cooling, and bayou shiner Richard makes a medicinal moonshine from wild-grown manglier.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Judges

programme.desc: Father and son oilmen employ a twin-toed warlock to hunt for oil.

programme.title: Backyard Oil: The Bird Man Cometh
programme.desc: Mountain man John Rascal only has one more shot to hit oil on his land.

programme.title: Backyard Oil: Milkshakin'
programme.desc: Two of Kentucky's biggest oil barons, go head-to-head in a winner-take-all drilling competition.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Grizzly Bait
programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Contamination
programme.desc: After a typhoon scatters debris through a Philippine forest, a stay-at-home mom and stubborn trucker try to find a way to survive there. Combating sickness and no food, they come together and ward off hunger by eating a skunk.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rise Above
programme.desc: An openly gay horse trainer and an anxious wilderness instructor take on the daunting jungle of Amazonia. Constant rain and a lack of resources make one survivalist hit rock bottom quickly, while the other is forced to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: No Safety in Numbers
programme.desc: Two pairs of survivalists are surprised when they must take on the deadly jungles of Panama side-by-side. But before their 21-day challenge begins, they have to re-think their survival strategies along gender lines.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Helter Swelter
programme.desc: Survivalists struggle to survive a sweltering Brazilian jungle. A competitor fashions 'shoes' out of a piece of rawhide and a bikini top out of palm leaves.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Fur the Win
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Laura Zerra and Steven Hall are dropped onto a frigid, snow-covered tundra in Alaska, 300 miles from the Arctic Circle. They use furs and skins to keep themselves warm.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Three for Three
programme.desc: Three people form a team and attempt to survive the 21-day challenge in the jungles of Ecuador. A survivalist makes sandals, a necklace and a bug brush out of a warthog.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gorger Parents Fight Back
programme.desc: As Traci and David prepare for a big Gypsy wedding, Traci's disapproving gorger mother threatens to wreak havoc on their special day. Gypsy Lee Ann and her gorger husband Joe butt heads when she plans to throw their young daughter Mary a coming-out party.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Reverse the Gypsy Curse
programme.desc: Brittany plans a traditional Gypsy funeral for her beloved late father, hoping to reverse a curse of bad luck that began after he was cremated. Maryann will only let her daughter Lexi marry gorger Kenny if he disowns his entire family.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Sisters Don't Marry Each Other's Husbands
programme.desc: Karen is ready for her perfect gypsy wedding. Problem is, she's marrying her sister's ex-husband, and neither her mom, nor her sister approves. Then, Selena decides to abandon gypsy tradition.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quints' Night Out
programme.desc: Blayke gets her big girl sleepover while the Quints invade Uncle Dale and Aunt Crystal's for the night. The kitchen renovation goes from bad to worse. The Busbys try to teach the girls to ride bikes. Hazel gets a surprise visit from her boyfriend, Graham.

programme.title: Sister Wives: The Basement Wife
programme.desc: Robyn questions why Christine said the family 'hates' her when they all gather. Mariah and Audrey look at wedding venues, and they say that anyone who disapproves of their same-sex marriage isn't invited. Then, COVID-19 fears sweep the country.
